# Bundled browser dependencies

These pinned files are bundled so the core UI, Markdown rendering, code highlighting, sanitization, and PDF reading do not fail when a public CDN is unavailable.

- Marked 15.0.7 — ISC license — https://github.com/markedjs/marked
- DOMPurify 3.2.4 — Apache-2.0 or MPL-2.0 — https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify
- Highlight.js 11.11.1 — BSD-3-Clause — https://github.com/highlightjs/highlight.js
- PDF.js 4.10.38 — Apache-2.0 — https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js

The distributed JavaScript files retain their upstream license notices. Versions are intentionally pinned; update the file, filename, HTML reference, service-worker entry, and this notice together.
